subject: docs(fleet): align CLAUDE.md with glow-props; drop local implementations + HISTORY
body:
Parts A–G of the synctone ↔ glow-props alignment sweep.

- Delete `docs/implementations/` (5 stale duplicates + 3 synctone-only
  stubs). Decisions recorded in docs/TODO.md before deletion:
  HTTPS_PROXY → delete (richer version already upstream), KEY_LESSONS →
  delete (content superseded by dedicated upstream patterns + local
  CLAUDE.md sections), TIMER_LEAKS → delete locally + upstream-candidate
  TODO noted for a future glow-props PR.
- Delete `docs/HISTORY.md`. Git history is the changelog — TODO.md
  updated to "delete completed items" instead of moving them.
- Add "## Implementation Patterns (Source of Truth)" verbatim from
  glow-props CLAUDE.md; add matching AI Note + Prohibition so future
  sessions never recreate local pattern copies.
- Add "## Communication" section between Principles and Code Standards;
  update top-of-file header to include COMMUNICATION; remove duplicate
  "ASK before assuming" / "Communication style" bullets from AI Notes.
- Triggers section already matched glow-props verbatim (48 triggers,
  8 groups, meta sweeps, reflective passes) — no change needed beyond
  the top-of-file header update.
- Existing trigger-name-collision AI Note already covers the only two
  real folder↔trigger collisions in this repo (`docs/` and `types/`);
  no further folders collide with any trigger name.

Tags: documentation, fleet-alignment, cleanup
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: fleet-alignment
Semver: patch
title: align CLAUDE.md with glow-props; drop local implementations + HISTORY
